# PRD: Order Cancellation Window

## Problem

Customers cannot cancel orders within 60 seconds of placement, even
before fulfillment begins.

## Goals

1. Allow cancellation up to 60s post-place.
2. Free held inventory promptly.

## Non-goals

- Refund automation (covered separately).
